personal.name: Sheikh Mujtaba
personal.title: AI Developer & Security Engineer
personal.summary: AI Developer and Security Engineer who builds production-grade Agentic AI systems for business automation. Specializes in architecting RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) pipelines, multi-agent orchestration, and secure AI infrastructure.

agenticAI.description: Agentic AI refers to autonomous AI systems that can take actions, make decisions, and complete complex tasks without constant human intervention. Unlike traditional chatbots that respond to single prompts, agentic systems use tools, maintain context across interactions, and can orchestrate multi-step workflows.

contextGrounding.description: Context grounding is the practice of connecting AI responses to specific, verifiable data sources rather than relying on the model's training data. This approach reduces AI hallucination by 60-80% and ensures factual accuracy.

experience.description: Built internal web tools and streamlined maintenance workflows, helping reduce potential downtime and improve operations.
Architected and deployed RAG-based AI chatbots with FastAPI + Qdrant, and built autonomous AI agent systems for enterprise workflow automation.
Delivered multiple full-stack client applications using Next.js and Tailwind CSS, integrating AI backends and improving SEO performance.
Integrated GPT-4, Gemini, and Claude into secure backend APIs for production use cases with better grounding and lower hallucination rates.
Applied web app pentesting, AI red teaming, prompt injection testing, and security best practices across software and ERP workflows.
Designed n8n workflow pipelines and custom Python automation scripts for end-to-end business process optimization.
